_note: Playability Gate tunables (Phase PG). Binary carries these as frozen _fallback_only defaults; this file is authoritative. Edit + refreshMchataisourceCache — no rebuild.
_b1_hard_timeouts: Total cap per gate run + per mount/reload cap so a stuck WKWebView can never wedge the app.
_b2_monolith: Big single-file apps (no web-components imports) run a lighter probe path. mode: full | light | skip.
_b3_layout_sanity: Mobile-viewport layout check: deterministic overflow/clip detection + a vision judge for overlap/unreadable.
_pg6_deep_play: PG.6 deep-play: the content driver (deepPlayDriverFile) plays the app move-by-move inside the gate probe and FAILS on turn-stealing / prompted-but-nothing-actionable wedges / NaN HUD text. Runs only when the app's goal resolves to a wisdom pack listed in deepPlayEnabledCategories, and only where the PG gates already run (install/branch gates stay behind their default-OFF flags; diagPlayability always). Binary fallback is an EMPTY list.
